brief: Student navigatsiya: mobil tab-bar + tez tuzatishlar (retention)

goals.title: Mobil tab-bar
goals.objective: <768px doimiy pastki bar: Suhbat/Testlar/Natijalar/Menyu, aktiv holat, kontent padding
goals.evidence: Mobil tab-bar: fixed bottom nav z-60 (Suhbat/Testlar/Natijalar/Menyu), aktiv holat, badge, safe-area, Main/overlay/sidebar'ga padding; fokusli panellarda (test/insho/kartochka/reja) yashirinadi

goals.title: Welcome karta
goals.objective: Birinchi karta haqiqiy Testlar bo'limiga olib boradi (chat prompt emas)
goals.evidence: Welcome birinchi karta endi haqiqiy Testlar bo'limini ochadi (setOverlayPanel tests + load)

goals.title: Kartochkalar nav
goals.evidence: Sidebar'ga Kartochkalar tugmasi qo'shildi (due badge bilan) — o'lik flashcards overlay endi ochiladi

goals.title: Streak 0-holat
goals.objective: Yangi o'quvchi ham streak vidjetini ko'radi (boshlang'ich holat)
goals.evidence: Streak vidjet endi progressData bor har o'quvchiga ko'rinadi (0-holat 'Bugun boshlang')
